title: psychotria lutea
intro: Psychotria lutea, also known as yellow leaf, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Psychotria lutea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-cough agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Psychotria lutea plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
